texts.orig: Greetings from Milele Beach Hotel
texts.text: Greetings from Milele Beach Hotel

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Trust this mail finds you in good health,
texts.text: Trust this mail finds you in good health,

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are pleased to introduce
texts.text: We are pleased to introduce

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Milele Beach Hotel
texts.text: Milele Beach Hotel

texts.label: text
texts.orig: to your esteemed Organization, with a view of developing a long-term relationship in business fraternity in the area of hotel accommodation, catering, conferencing and recreational activities
texts.text: to your esteemed Organization, with a view of developing a long-term relationship in business fraternity in the area of hotel accommodation, catering, conferencing and recreational activities

texts.label: text
texts.orig: The Hotel being home away from home is a prime destination for conferencing and leisure in its many facets.
texts.text: The Hotel being home away from home is a prime destination for conferencing and leisure in its many facets.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Despite the Hotel’s proximity to Mombasa – Malindi road, it exudes an air of tranquillity with huge and well-maintained tropical gardens that provide welcome shade in the heat of the day. Overlooking the Indian Ocean is the white sandy beach suitable for sand bathing, wedding and public functions along the Northern Coastal Strip.
texts.text: Despite the Hotel’s proximity to Mombasa – Malindi road, it exudes an air of tranquillity with huge and well-maintained tropical gardens that provide welcome shade in the heat of the day. Overlooking the Indian Ocean is the white sandy beach suitable for sand bathing, wedding and public functions along the Northern Coastal Strip.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Milele Beach Hotel
texts.text: Milele Beach Hotel

texts.label: text
texts.orig: offers hospitality service in a relatively neat, clean and secure environment.
texts.text: offers hospitality service in a relatively neat, clean and secure environment.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our hotel has 2 main restaurants with different capacities and offering world class service at given hours of the day or night.
texts.text: Our hotel has 2 main restaurants with different capacities and offering world class service at given hours of the day or night.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Our hotel has a capacity of 72 ensuite rooms with an integrated air-conditioning system that ensures a pleasant atmosphere. The rooms are furnished with satellite TVs with DSTV connection, mini fridges, and hair dryers. They have direct dial telephones, panoramic views of the gardens / swimming pool and mosquito nets fitted in all the rooms.
texts.text: Our hotel has a capacity of 72 ensuite rooms with an integrated air-conditioning system that ensures a pleasant atmosphere. The rooms are furnished with satellite TVs with DSTV connection, mini fridges, and hair dryers. They have direct dial telephones, panoramic views of the gardens / swimming pool and mosquito nets fitted in all the rooms.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We are located in a very serene environment along Mombasa-Malindi highway with close proximity to Nyali business hub, Jomo Kenyatta Public Beach, Haller Park amongst others. We are approximately 10 km from Mombasa central business district with easy accessibility from Moi International Airport and Vipingo airstrip.
texts.text: We are located in a very serene environment along Mombasa-Malindi highway with close proximity to Nyali business hub, Jomo Kenyatta Public Beach, Haller Park amongst others. We are approximately 10 km from Mombasa central business district with easy accessibility from Moi International Airport and Vipingo airstrip.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: We pride ourselves in our customized services provided by highly trained and committed staff to deliver on our dream service of a “heavenly experience”. We have (4) six excellent conference venues to fit your requirements.
texts.text: We pride ourselves in our customized services provided by highly trained and committed staff to deliver on our dream service of a “heavenly experience”. We have (4) six excellent conference venues to fit your requirements.
